allow: Bash(docker exec -it e-tech-market-backend-1 php artisan loyalty:update-ranks)
Bash(docker exec e-tech-market-backend-1 php artisan loyalty:update-ranks)
Bash(docker exec e-tech-market-db-1 psql -U postgres -d etech_market -c "SELECT id, name, rank_id, total_spent FROM users WHERE rank_id >= 4 ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 5;")
Bash(docker exec e-tech-market-db-1 psql -U postgres -d etech -c "SELECT id, name, rank_id, total_spent FROM users WHERE rank_id >= 4 ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 5;")
Bash(docker exec e-tech-market-backend-1 php artisan cache:clear)
Bash(docker exec e-tech-market-backend-1 php artisan cache:clear --tags=admin_dashboard)

Bash(docker exec e-tech-market-backend-1 php artisan tinker --execute="echo json_encode\(App\\Services\\AdminDashboardService::new\(\)->getStats\(''month'', null, null, ''daily''\)[''top_customers''], JSON_PRETTY_PRINT\);")
Bash(docker exec e-tech-market-backend-1 php artisan route:list)
